title: Lattice Form Frame
description: A slicer — carves a box into Cells. The root Frame carves the whole slide; a sovereign Frame docked in the stage claims the canvas and suppresses chrome Cells (design/forms.md §5, §8, §9). One folder per Frame: lib/forms/frame/<id>/<id>.manifest.json. Adding a sovereign Frame folder (exemptFromChrome:true) auto-extends the engine's FORM_TOGGLE_SKIP set — see lib/integrations/marp/plugins.js.

id.description: Frame identifier, kebab-case. For a sovereign Frame this is the `_class` value the toggle skips.

form.description: The Form value this Frame realizes (one of the twelve Frame types, design/design-system.md §4 / design/forms.md §8).

kind.description: root carves the slide; framed docks in the main Cell keeping the chrome Frame; sovereign claims the whole canvas and suppresses chrome Cells (design/forms.md §5).

exemptFromChrome.description: True for sovereign / chrome-skipped Frames. The set of Frames with exemptFromChrome:true IS the engine's FORM_TOGGLE_SKIP set (derived in lib/integrations/marp/plugins.js).

cells.description: The Cell ids this Frame produces. Each MUST resolve to a real Cell definition (lib/forms/cell/).

suppresses.description: Chrome Cell ids a sovereign Frame hides. Each MUST resolve to a real Cell definition.
